titles.title: Providing for consideration of the bill (H.R. 1834) to advance policy priorities that will break the gridlock.
Providing for consideration of the bill (H.R. 1834) to advance policy priorities that will break the gridlock.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Rules.

bill.summary: This resolution provides for the consideration of the bill (H.R. 1834) to advance policy priorities that will break the gridlock.
